articles.title: Artemis II relied on European science: what that means for the region’s space ambitions - Nature
articles.description: The Artemis II mission is a success for the European Space Agency, as well as for NASA. Will Europe crew its own lunar missions?
articles.content:
The European Service Module, depicted on the left, provides propulsion and life-support systems for the Orion spacecraft.Credit: ESA-D. Ducros
As the Orion spacecraft heads back to Earth and towards… [+3278 chars]
